name: yulyrics
description: OBS 브라우저 소스로 송출하는 가사 오버레이 프로그램

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@yulyrics/overlay && npm run build --workspace=@yulyrics/control
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start --workspace=@yulyrics/server
scripts.desktop: npm run build && npm run start --workspace=@yulyrics/desktop
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run dist --workspace=@yulyrics/desktop
